title: Six consistency problems in a Go crypto backend
description: Nonces, idempotency keys, replay protection, event ordering - six patterns for a consistent Go crypto backend. Visual notes from Part 1.

title: Green Tea: Understanding Go's Garbage Collector
description: What happens when Go's GC runs, how tricolor mark-and-sweep works, and what changed in 1.26. Went deep on this one as a side project.
